creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Thunar 1.6.10 with this patch still crash, when renaming files / folders.

<uname>
FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE amd64

<make.conf>
CPUTYPE?=core2
OPTIONS_SET=CUPS
WITHOUT_LPR=YES
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=apache=2.4
QT4_OPTIONS=CUPS NAS QGTKSTYLE
LOCALIZED_LANG=ru
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=perl5=5.20
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS=mysql=5.7
